title: Login page not loading
description: Customer reports that the login page shows a blank screen after submitting credentials.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Transactions are failing due to timeout errors during payment processing.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset email link redirects to an invalid page.

title: Dashboard data mismatch
description: Sales metrics displayed on dashboard do not match exported reports.

title: Mobile app crashes on launch
description: App crashes immediately after opening on Android devices.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: System notifications are being delivered 30–40 minutes late.

title: File upload failure
description: Users cannot upload PDF files larger than 5MB.

title: Incorrect invoice generation
description: Generated invoices show incorrect tax calculation.

title: API authentication error
description: External API requests are failing with 401 unauthorized responses.

title: Profile image not updating
description: Users cannot update their profile pictures; old images persist.

title: Session timeout too short
description: Users are logged out after only 5 minutes of inactivity.
